query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%suppository%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%suppositories%' THEN 'Suppository'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%film-coated tablet%' THEN 'Film-Coated Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%tablet%' THEN 'Tablet'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%capsule%' THEN 'Capsule'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%injection%' THEN 'Injection'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%infusion%' THEN 'Infusion'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%syrup%' THEN 'Syrup'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%suspension%' THEN 'Suspension'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%solution%' THEN 'Solution'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%cream%' THEN 'Cream'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%ointment%' THEN 'Ointment'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%gel%' THEN 'Gel'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%patch%' THEN 'Patch'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%drops%' THEN 'Drops'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%spray%' THEN 'Spray'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%inhaler%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%inhalation%' THEN 'Inhaler'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%powder%' THEN 'Powder'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%sachet%' THEN 'Sachet'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END as form,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM drug_lens
GROUP BY form
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 30;

    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%solution%' THEN 'Solution'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%cream%' THEN 'Cream'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%ointment%' THEN 'Ointment'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%gel%' THEN 'Gel'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%patch%' THEN 'Patch'
    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%drops%' THEN 'Drops'

    WHEN LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%inhaler%' OR LOWER(trade_name) LIKE '%inhalation%' THEN 'Inhaler'
